title: MCtale
description: Inspired by Hytale’s style, featuring colorful fantasy visuals, exploration-focused gameplay, RPG progression, dungeons, bosses, and a strong sense of adventure.
body:
Explore a world filled with unique creatures, magic-based systems, ancient structures, and challenging bosses, presented with a colorful and stylized aesthetic inspired by Hytale’s visual style. The modpack focuses on exploration and environmental storytelling, encouraging players to explore naturally and discover hidden content across the world.

With adjusted survival mechanics, RPG-style progression, improved animations, and enhanced sound design, the modpack aims to balance open-ended sandbox gameplay with more guided adventure elements. It supports both solo play and cooperative multiplayer, offering an experience inspired by Hytale while remaining grounded in Minecraft’s core gameplay.
